title: WHERE clause with AND NOT is broken
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test.tbl2 (id int NOT NULL, value float NOT NULL, description varchar(255), CONSTRAINT test_id_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id));
SELECT (1) as result FROM test.tbl2 WHERE value > 15.0 AND description IS NOT NULL;
SELECT (1) as result FROM test.tbl2 WHERE id = 1 AND NOT value < 10.0;
key_bug_features: WHERE clause with AND NOT fails to return expected results
